title: XtreamCloud Minecraft-themed hosting site with login, plans, UPI payment QR, and post-payment hosting panel

requirements.text: Create the XtreamCloud site shell and navigation with a Minecraft-inspired theme and a purple + black color palette, using consistent typography, spacing, and components across all pages. Ensure the product name "XtreamCloud" appears prominently in the header and page titles.

quotes:
Make a Minecraft Hosting Web Name - XtreamCloud
Color - Purple And Black

Theme - Minecraft

acceptanceCriteria: All pages use a consistent purple/black Minecraft-inspired visual style
The header/branding shows "XtreamCloud" clearly
All user-facing text is in English

requirements.text: Implement an authentication page (Page A) with two modes: Register and Login using an ID (username/email) and Password. Include an "Already logged in?" button/link that, when clicked (or when an active session is detected), routes the user automatically to Page B (Plans).

quotes: Make A Section Login Of Id PassWord  if u are already register So Make make a <button_Already Login?> When Login Go To AutoMatic Page B

acceptanceCriteria: User can register with ID + password and then log in with the same credentials
If the user is already authenticated, they are automatically routed to Page B (Plans) without needing to log in again
An "Already logged in?" button/link exists and routes to Page B when a session exists

requirements.text: Add backend support for ID/password authentication with session handling (create account, login, logout, and a query to validate current session). Persist registered users and session data in the single Motoko actor.

quotes: Make A Section Login Of Id PassWord

acceptanceCriteria: Backend exposes methods to register and log in with ID + password
Backend exposes a method to check whether the caller is authenticated
User data persists across refreshes/reloads (stable storage in the canister)

requirements.text: Create Page B (Plans) listing the four plans (HEXO, METEOR, DOOMSDAY, XTREME) with the exact pricing and specs provided, each with an "ORDER NOW" button.

quotes:
Make Section B For Plans

HEXO PLAN - ₹80/MONTH

6 GB RAM 
200% CPU 
12 GB NVMe SSD
Basic DDos Protection 

<button> ORDER NOW

METEOR PLAN - ₹280/MONTH

12 GB RAM 
300% CPU
24 GB NVMe SSD
Basic DDos Protection 

<button> ORDER NOW 

DOOMSDAY PLAN - ₹850/MONTH

32 GB RAM
Unlimited CPU
64 GB NVMe SSD
Basic DDos Protection 
 
<button> ORDER NOW

XTREME PLAN - ₹950/MONTH

64 GB RAM 
Unlimited CPU
96 GB NVMe SSD
BASIC DDos Protection 

<BUTTON> ORDER NOW

acceptanceCriteria: Plans page shows all four plans with the exact names, prices, and specs
Each plan has an "ORDER NOW" button that initiates the payment step

requirements.text: Implement the payment UI for an order: allow choosing PhonePe, Google Pay, Paytm, or generic UPI; when the user clicks the Pay button, show a QR code and UPI payment details on-screen.

quotes: Payment - Phonepe,GooglePay,Paytm,UPI When SomeOne Click On Pay Button Show Qr And UPI

acceptanceCriteria: User can select one of: PhonePe, Google Pay, Paytm, UPI
Clicking Pay displays a QR code and UPI details (UPI ID / payment string) for the selected plan
The payment UI clearly indicates which plan is being paid for

requirements.text: Create Page C (Hosting Panel) that is accessible after payment completion and shows the user’s purchased plan plus hosting resource information: storage (GB), RAM, CPU, and process info.

quotes: Make A Page C Of Panel

Make A Page For Panel When SomeOne Done Payment
Make A Panel Of Hosting Where Show Gb And Ram CPU Process

acceptanceCriteria: After completing the payment flow, the user is routed to the Hosting Panel (Page C)
Hosting Panel displays the selected plan and its allocated resources (RAM/CPU/SSD GB)
Hosting Panel includes a section labeled for process info (e.g., process status/summary) and displays data (even if simulated)

requirements.text: Add backend order tracking so that when a user places an order for a plan and completes the payment flow, the canister records the purchased plan for that authenticated user and the frontend can load it on Page C.

quotes: Make A Page For Panel When SomeOne Done Payment

acceptanceCriteria: Backend stores a user’s active plan selection after payment completion
Frontend can query the backend for the authenticated user’s current/active plan to render the Hosting Panel

requirements.text: Generate and include Minecraft-inspired static branding assets (logo + background) and render them in the UI from frontend/public/assets/generated, without serving images via the backend.
acceptanceCriteria: Generated images exist under frontend/public/assets/generated and are used in the UI
The UI uses the logo in the header and the background in at least the landing/auth experience

constraints: Backend must remain a single Motoko actor in backend/main.mo (no additional backend services).
Do not edit files under frontend immutablePaths; compose and build around them.
All user-facing text must be English.
nonGoals: No real payment gateway integration or automatic payment verification (only showing QR/UPI details and then proceeding based on user completion).

required: Minecraft-inspired pixel/block-style logo with the wordmark “XtreamCloud”, purple/black palette (xtreamcloud-logo.dim_512x512.png)
Minecraft-inspired banner/hero background featuring blocky terrain silhouettes and subtle purple lighting, dark/black base (xtreamcloud-hero-bg.dim_1920x1080.png)
